description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that can be triggered manually or on pull requests. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, 3.13) across different platforms (ubuntu-20.04, macOS, Windows). For each job, check out the repository deeply, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with Poetry, run tests and linters with Poetry, and upload coverage to Codecov on Linux.
